meaning: n.亚哈随鲁(基督教<<圣经>>中的波斯国王,娶Esther为妻)
examples: On that day did the king Ahasuerus give the house of Haman the Jews' enemy unto Esther the queen.
Mordecai refused to pay homage to Haman, whom king Ahasuerus had promoted to the highest position under himself.
Then the king Ahasuerus answered and said unto Esther the queen, Who is he, and where is he, that durst presume in his heart to do so?
